query: SELECT id, title, status, category, destination, destinationCity FROM tours ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute SELECT id, title, status, category, destination, destinationCity FROM tours ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
